description: You are analyzing an E. coli outbreak using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis with the loaded EColi FoodHistory dataset (359 records). Create a 2x2 contingency table to investigate the association between hamburger consumption (HAMBURGER) and illness (ILLDUM). The output must include counts for exposed and unexposed cases and controls, the odds ratio, 95% confidence interval, chi-square statistic, and p-value.
